info.title: Taj Lift - Field Operations Management Suite (Light + Dark)
info.author: Taj Lift
info.subject: Product brochure

footer.text: Taj Lift  -  Field Operations Management Suite  -  Light + Frosted Glass Dark Mode

stack.text: Light Mode by default  -  Frosted Glass Dark Mode as a feature

Taj Lift is a mobile-first operations suite that unifies lead capture, estimation, installation tracking, preventive maintenance, breakdown response, and financial oversight for elevator installation and AMC businesses.
This brochure presents the application in Light Mode (the default, clean, professional look) and showcases the Frosted Glass Dark Mode as a switchable theme.
All light-mode screens captured from the running Taj Lift application (React + Firebase + Google Gemini AI).

Taj Lift ships with a light, paper-toned theme as the default. The phone mockup floats on soft radial-gradient pastel backgrounds with crisp slate text, ideal for daylight field use and client presentations. Below is the full screen tour - 15 live captures across the suite.

One tap in Settings flips the entire suite to a deep Frosted Glass Dark Mode - glassmorphic cards, neon sky accents and an OLED-friendly palette. The same biometric session lock, dashboards, CRM, PM, dispatch, tracker, finance and AI advisor carry over seamlessly. Below: the same feature pages rendered in Dark Mode.
Nine capabilities span the lead-to-handover elevator lifecycle - accessible in both Light and Dark mode.

text.text: - Biometric (Touch ID / Face ID) gated sign-in with 4-digit PIN backup and per-session lock.
- Request accounts with role and region scoping; avatar presets; compliance ack.
- Enquiries, Jobs, PM/AMC and Breakdown counts; project expenses; active field logs.
- Pipeline and follow-up tabs; lead cards with status, contact and elevator requirements.
- Component checklist with Good/Avg/Attention matrix, photo evidence, PM slot and AMC expiry.
- Live tech status, distance, battery; SLA dispatch; breakdown incident with escalation.
- Gantt stages, dynamic estimation engine (VAT 5%), milestone payments, repair orders, MIS.
- Budget vs spend by category; cost-efficiency flags; Gemini AI report + chat advisor.
- Full-screen 14-slide client deck: cover, dashboard, tracker, finance and GPS map slides; print to PDF.

stack.text: Taj Lift brings lead-to-handover elevator operations into one mobile suite - with biometric security, live field tracking, AI financial advice, a client-ready proposal deck, and a Light / Dark theme switch.
Built with React, Firebase and Google Gemini AI.
